mapper.sql: select h.handover_id, h.handover_no, h.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, h.handover_type, h.from_dept_id, from_dept.dept_name as from_dept_name, h.from_user_id, ifnull(nullif(from_user.nick_name, ''), from_user.user_name) as from_user_name, h.from_location_name, h.to_dept_id, to_dept.dept_name as to_dept_name, h.to_user_id, ifnull(nullif(to_user.nick_name, ''), to_user.user_name) as to_user_name, h.handover_status, h.handover_date, h.location_name, h.confirm_by, h.confirm_time, h.create_by, h.create_time, h.update_by, h.update_time, h.remark from ast_asset_handover h left join ast_asset_ledger a on h.asset_id = a.asset_id and a.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dept from_dept on h.from_dept_id = from_dept.dept_id left join sys_dept to_dept on h.to_dept_id = to_dept.dept_id left join sys_user from_user on h.from_user_id = from_user.user_id left join sys_user to_user on h.to_user_id = to_user.user_id
mapper.select: select max(handover_no) from ast_asset_handover where handover_no like concat(#{handoverNoPrefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into ast_asset_handover ( handover_no, asset_id, handover_type, from_dept_id, from_user_id, from_location_name, to_dept_id, to_user_id, handover_status, handover_date, location_name, confirm_by, confirm_time, create_by, remark, create_time ) values ( #{handoverNo}, #{assetId}, #{handoverType}, #{fromDeptId}, #{fromUserId}, #{fromLocationName}, #{toDeptId}, #{toUserId}, #{handoverStatus}, #{handoverDate}, #{locationName}, #{confirmBy}, #{confirmTime}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
